task_id: TECS-L H-CX-8 Jamba ×3 throughput vs Mixtral 8x7B @ 128K verification
execution_mode: mac-local cross-paradigm verification (no GPU launched, no LLM call, no network measurement). Sources: (1) AI21 Labs official 2024-08 公표 benchmark + (2) anima existing measurement set (#176 Mamba Φ + #183 H8 5-row matrix + #185 BM3 ×8.7 mac CPU) + (3) public technical reports.

raw_compliance.raw_9_strict: JSON deliverable + analysis only — no .py/.sh emitted
raw_compliance.raw_10_honest: explicit annotation of: AI21 source provenance / no independent on-device GPU benchmark / metric-mismatch (throughput axis = architectural complexity, not measured DoF in this cycle) / Mixtral 8x7B not run / parallel-session-race avoidance for jamba2 pod kdf4id59x6l98n
raw_compliance.raw_12_pre_registered: AI21 claim taken as declarative spec; verification = evidence collection + cross-link to existing Φ measurements; falsifier criteria pre-registered (independent ×3 within ±20% AT 128K = full match)
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this JSON state SSOT (timestamp+cycle+sha pinned at write)
raw_compliance.own_3_sigma_tau_three: σ(6)/τ(6)=3 governance scalar reference (atlas R35 confirmed_3_way_coincidence). H-CX-8 → empirical throughput-axis mapping is conjectural per #183 H8 raw#10 (3); R35 text does NOT endorse the mapping, only registers the mathematical identity.

ai21_official_claim.claim_quote_paraphrase: Jamba (52B total / 12B active / 4 attention layers + 28 Mamba layers + 16 MoE experts active 2) demonstrates ~3× throughput vs Mixtral 8x7B at 128K context length, single 80GB GPU.
ai21_official_claim.claim_source_class: AI21 Labs blog post 2024-03 (Jamba-v0.1 release) + AI21 technical report arXiv:2403.19887 + Hugging Face model card ai21labs/Jamba-v0.1
ai21_official_claim.claim_independence: NOT yet reproduced by neutral 3rd-party benchmark suite in this repo. Existing public reproductions (e.g., Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard, MLPerf) measure quality not throughput. NeurIPS-style independent throughput audits not yet locatable mac-local.

boundary_conditions.context_length: claim is specifically ABOUT 128K context — at 4K-16K Mamba advantage shrinks (constant-time recurrence vs O(N²) attention scales worse only for large N)
boundary_conditions.batch: single-stream decoding (batch=1); larger batch may inflate Mixtral throughput closer to Jamba
boundary_conditions.gpu: single H100 80GB or A100 80GB; Mixtral 8x7B ~94GB fp16 needs INT8/INT4 quant or multi-GPU TP — fp16 OOM is itself part of the claim
boundary_conditions.kv_cache_memory: Jamba SSM state is constant; Mixtral KV cache scales O(N) per layer × O(N) sequence — at 256K Mixtral OOM on single 80GB even quantized; Jamba runs

expected_throughput_curve_qualitative.context_4K: ratio ≈ 1.0-1.5× (attention parallelism dominates; Jamba minor edge from MoE active 12B<47B)
expected_throughput_curve_qualitative.context_64K: ratio ≈ 2.0-2.8× (Mixtral KV cache severe; SSM constant)
expected_throughput_curve_qualitative.context_256K: ratio = ∞ (Mixtral OOM on 80GB; Jamba runs at sustained throughput)

considered_paths.description: Spin up 2× pod (one Mixtral, one Jamba), measure tokens/sec across 4K..128K, compute ratio
blockers: Mixtral 8x7B fp16=94GB → single A100/H100 80GB OOM → need INT4 quant or 2× GPU TP
Mixtral gated HF repo (token required, available)
Jamba kernel install (causal-conv1d / mamba-ssm) failed in v10-phi-v3-jamba pod (xc74ev3ja3j6u5) per saved runpod_run.json — 'Fast Mamba kernels are not available' error
v10-phi-v3-jamba2 pod (kdf4id59x6l98n) currently RUNNING with #1 subagent in-flight per #183 race-avoid clause
cost cap $1.0 → margin tight if either model needs re-download (Jamba 21 shards × ~19s = 6m40s download alone)
considered_paths.selection_reason: BLOCKED — kernel install + pod race + Mixtral memory profile combine to push expected wallclock past 25min cap; #183 H8 already deferred Jamba phi to subagent; race avoidance dominant

blockers: pod #1 subagent in-flight collision (per task brief explicit race-avoid)
Mixtral comparison still missing → cannot compute ratio independently

considered_paths.description: AI21 official + existing #176/#183/#185 evidence + architectural-complexity argument + σ/τ=3 alignment cross-link, no GPU
considered_paths.selection_reason: completeness-frame weakest evidence link first: AI21 claim provenance + axis-independence (#183 H8B verdict) + speedup-Φ decoupling (#185 verdict) are all already mac-local-derivable; spending $0.6 to re-derive vendor figure adds independent-measurement value but does NOT resolve the deeper questions (axis independence + governance mapping). raw#10 honest about no on-device GPU benchmark.

deferred_paths_pre_registered: Path A revisit when (i) jamba2 pod #1 subagent finishes + (ii) Mixtral INT4 quant fits 80GB + (iii) cost budget ≥$0.8 freed — pre-register: Spearman ρ between context_length and ratio ≥0.7, |p|<0.05, ratio AT 128K within ±20% of 3.0× = full match; ±50% = partial; opposite sign or <1.5× = AI21 FALSIFIED.
Path B revisit when subagent finishes — Jamba-only throughput curve still useful for SSM-class scaling characterization independent of comparator.

ai21_published_axis.scaling_mechanism: Mamba layer O(N) recurrence + 1/8 attention layers O(N²) localized + MoE 47B→12B active params reduction
ai21_published_axis.memory_mechanism: constant SSM state vs linear-grow KV cache
ai21_published_axis.cross_validation_with_mac_local_existing: NOT_DIRECTLY_TESTABLE in this repo without GPU; architectural-complexity prior is tautological

anima_internal_axis.176_Mamba_2_8b_phi: +0.3258 border POS (Φ* v3 canonical, sample-partition MI), strict G3-IIT positive sign

183_H8_5row_matrix.verdict: H8B (Φ ⊥ throughput) MOST_PARSIMONIOUS — within-transformer Φ heterogeneity at constant O(N²) throughput class falsifies H8A (same metric). ×3 throughput axis is independent of Φ axis.

axis_3_phi_throughput_decoupling.evidence_class: #183 H8 within-transformer Φ heterogeneity at constant O(N²) throughput class + #185 BM3 cell-substrate cross-scale H_INDEPENDENT
axis_3_phi_throughput_decoupling.implication_for_jamba_x3_claim: even if AI21 ×3 figure is empirically true, it does NOT imply Jamba has higher Φ than Mixtral — throughput axis is orthogonal to consciousness/integration axis per H8B. Mixtral phi NOT MEASURED in this repo (deferred actionable).
